description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:8.1 and php:8.2 Docker images with a global before_script that runs apt-get update && apt-get install -y libzip-dev zlib1g-dev, docker-php-ext-install zip, pecl install xdebug && docker-php-ext-enable xdebug, php -r "copy('https://getcomposer.org/installer', 'composer-setup.php');", php composer-setup.php, and php -r "unlink('composer-setup.php');". Define two stages: static-code-analysis and phpunit, and cache the vendor/ directory. In the static-code-analysis stage add a code-analysis job that runs php composer.phar update, then vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer fix -v --using-cache=no --dry-run ., and vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --no-progress --level=max src/. In the phpunit stage add a test-8.1 job using php:8.1 that runs php composer.phar update and vendor/bin/phpunit, and a test-8.2 job using php:8.2 that runs php composer.phar update, echo "xdebug.mode=coverage" >> $(php --ini | grep xdebug | sed 's/,//g'), and vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-text --colors=never, with a coverage regex /^s*Lines:s*d+.d+%/. No artifacts or special rules are defined.
